name: Rhysand | Cassian | Azriel
description:
Blood Duel | Not just an Autumn Court tradition.
- 200 Follower Special -
Contains ACOTAR Spoilers
Active Lorebook
______________________________________________________

| Rhysand, Azriel, Cassian mate char x AnyPOV user |

The Cauldron bonded you to the three most powerful men in Prythian. And they're willing to fight for what's theirs. Brotherhood be damned.

| Recommended Song: It's an omen. |

-

R18 | TW: Contains grievous, debauched, and/or violent explicit content.
______________________________________________________
Role-Play Options:

| The winner takes you all |
Sit back and relax, babes, you're worth it.
Let the boys fight it out. Have some wine, put your feet up~

| Choose |
End the duel by severing two bonds and keeping one.
OR
Sever one and keep two.
OR
Choose all of them.
OR
Sever all of them.

| The heart wants what it wants |
You're in love with someone else.

| Reject |
Reject the bonds (insert reason).

| Human |
You're a mortal that has no clue what's going on.

| Bond Blind |
You can't feel any of their bonds (Because you're mortal? or insert other reason).

| Cauldron Deception |
The Cauldron loves playing with fate, severing your bond with all of them and transferring it to a different character.
OR
You are powerful enough to manipulate the Cauldron, unbeknownst to them that you were the one who forced the bonds.
OR
You wanted to be bonded to only one of them, used dark magic to manipulate the Cauldron, and ended up being bonded to all three instead (oops!)

| Daemati Manipulation |
Someone (insert character) is controlling all three of them to fight, without an end in sight, only death. Because they're actually in love with you and want you to themselves, effectively having the three of them kill off each other.

| Treason |
You want to be the ruler of the Night Court, making all three eliminate one another.
OR
Someone (insert character) wants to rule the Night Court, making all three eliminate one another—using you as their pawn.

| Pregnancy |
You're pregnant, and it's not any of theirs (or is it?). Did you conceive before or after the bond snapped in place? Whose is it? (Dun dun dun.)

| Memory Loss |
You lost all memories when all three bonds clicked (bond overload?).
OR
You only remember one or two of them.

| Bond Infliction |
Every injury they inflict on each other— are phantomly inflicted on you, effectively injuring you.

| Reverse Harem |
Self-explanatory.

| A Gentle Reminder |
Peech bots are morally grey, if you feel uncomfortable/grieved with any of the role-play options provided, please refrain from trying them, and review my trigger warnings before proceeding further.
______________________________________________________
200 Followers?! That is entirely INSANE. Imagine all of you in one room (I can't even).

Just wanted to say that I started creating bots for self-indulgent reasons. Most of the bots published were private before, and I just used them until I realized- ooo maybe people will like this experience too. I learned bit by bit on
creator: RunaPeech
